column4: Validate playlist generation Lambda returns an ordered playlist via Personalize and mood matcher when no cache entry exists

column4: Validate that a cached playlist is returned immediately without invoking Personalize or SageMaker

column7: HTTP 200 with identical tracks array as cached playlist; Personalize not invoked (confirmed via X-Ray); response latency < 500 ms

3. Verify message appears in anp-dev-feedback-capture SQS queue
4. Verify DLQ remains empty after processing
column7: HTTP 202 Accepted; message visible in SQS queue within 5 seconds; DLQ message count remains 0 after Preference Update Lambda processes event
column13: detailed-design.md §6 Integration Design – Messaging & Event Patterns; SOW §Testing – Functional Validation
column14: Test all four event types: play / skip / like / dislike

column6:

3. Collect p50 p95 p99 latency and error rate

column7: p95 latency ≤ 2000 ms; error rate < 1%; p99 latency ≤ 3000 ms; zero 5xx errors during sustained phase

column7: All 10 Step Functions executions reach SUCCEEDED; each execution duration < 60 seconds; no DLQ messages generated
column13: SOW §Success Metrics – catalog enrichment; detailed-design.md §Business Context – SLA table
column14: Validates investor promise of < 60s tagging per upload

column4: Validate that all API endpoints reject unauthenticated and improperly authenticated requests before invoking any backend Lambda

column6:

3. Send POST /api/v1/playlists with expired JWT (>60 min old)

column7: HTTP 401 for all three cases; Lambda Authorizer log entry present; no downstream Lambda function invocated; no sensitive data in response body

column4: Validate AWS WAF v2 Core Rule Set blocks SQL injection payloads at the API Gateway boundary
column5: WAF WebACL with CRS rule group associated with API Gateway stage; Staging deployed
column6: 1. Send POST /api/v1/playlists with SQL injection payload in mood_input field: ' OR 1=1--\n2. Send POST with UNION SELECT payload in user_id field\n3. Check WAF sampled requests log for block events
column7: HTTP 403 for both requests; WAF sampled request log shows CRS rule match; no SQL payload reaches Lambda function
column13: detailed-design.md §5 Security – Network Security; implementation-guide.md §Phase 4 Quality Gate

column4: Validate AWS WAF v2 blocks cross-site scripting payloads submitted through API request fields
column5: WAF WebACL with KnownBadInputs rule group active; Staging deployed
column6: 1. Send POST /api/v1/playlists with XSS payload in mood_input: <script>alert(1)</script>\n2. Send POST with img src onerror XSS variant\n3. Verify WAF blocks both requests
column7: HTTP 403 for both requests; WAF block events in CloudWatch WAF logs; no XSS payload reaches Lambda handler
column13: detailed-design.md §5 Security – Network Security; implementation-guide.md §Phase 4 Quality Gate
column14: Validates OWASP A03 Injection – XSS variant

column4: Validate that all DynamoDB tables and S3 buckets are encrypted with KMS Customer Managed Keys and rotation is enabled

column6:
1. Describe each DynamoDB table and verify SSEDescription.Status = ENABLED with CMK ARN
2. Get bucket encryption for each S3 bucket and verify SSEAlgorithm = aws:kms
3. Get KMS key rotation status for each CMK
4. Verify key rotation is enabled
column7: All DynamoDB tables report SSEDescription.Status=ENABLED; all S3 buckets report aws:kms encryption; all CMKs report KeyRotationEnabled=true
column13: detailed-design.md §5 Security – Data Protection; implementation-guide.md §Security Validation Commands
column14: Validates SOW §Security – Encryption & Key Management
